content.text:
Objectifs de l’enseignement
This course teaches advanced technologies and topics of artificial intelligence, that covers various methods within artificial intelligence (AI) and their applications in Cybersecurity. The course also introduces some examples of applications of AI algorithms to solve Cybersecurity problems and issues. The course uses Python as the primary language, although some projects can include other languages and tools.
Contenu de la matière
Informed search: A* search and heuristics
Intelligent Agents
Machine Learning & Deep Learning
a)  supervised learning models & unsupervised learning models
b)  Building a machine learning pipeline
c)  Deep Learning
Introduction to reinforcement Learning
Uncertainty and Probabilistic Reasoning
Applications of AI in Cybersecurity
a)  Overview of AI application in cyber security (Data privacy issues)
b)  Data-Driven Network and Computer Security
c)  Spam filter methods
d)  Applications of machine learning to network security
Mode d’évaluation : Contrôle continu, examen
Références
Artificial Intelligence: A Modern Approach (Russell & Norvig, Pearson, 2020)
Reinforcement Learning: An Introduction (Sutton & Barto, 2018)
Hands-On Artificial Intelligence for Cybersecurity (Parisi et al, Packt Publishing, 2019) -
Practical AI for Cybersecurity (Ravi Das, CRC Press, 2021) –
Machine Learning and Security, (David Freeman, Clarence Chio), O'Reilly Media, Inc.,
2018. (electronic edition available via MQ Library)
